events.title: Reunion con JP — resolver 14 preguntas abiertas Pipeline v2
events.notes: Sesion 24 (2026-05-27) cerro 5 decisiones del Pipeline v2 caminando el diff entre spec v1 (sesion 21) y pipeline-nexostrat-v2.html (revision JP). Quedaron 14 preguntas abiertas documentadas en 00_META/proposals/2026-05-27_preguntas-jp-pipeline-v2.{md,docx}. Las 7 primeras son bloqueantes para arrancar implementacion: (1) que CRM (Baserow/otra/manual); (2) estructura interna del .docx (4 secciones espejo + 5a propuesta vs nueva vs 2 docs); (3) cifras concretas o rango cualitativo en propuesta; (4) catalogo de capacidades antes del primer cliente; (5) 6 fases Ciclo 2 skills/humano/mezcla; (6) que cubre garantia 1 mes; (7) garantia incluida o aparte. Las 7 siguientes son importantes pero no bloquean Skill 6 tecnico: canales captacion, funnel etapas, plantillas seguimiento, canal seguimiento, que detiene seguimiento, JP en el flujo, Cowork como nombre comercial. Post-reunion: spec v2 oficial en 00_META/proposals/2026-05-28_skill6-pipeline-redesign-v2.md + tasks tecnicos concretos para arrancar Fase A-H + cierre de t-skill6-jp-feedback-await.

events.title: Trixx Logistics reunion formal — OCURRIDA 2026-05-26
events.notes: First real client run under JP's confirmed 5-skill 6-phase pipeline. Target: Trixx Logistics / Grupo Trixx / Trix Importaciones Comerciales S. de R.L. de C.V. (Mexican logistics, Tijuana, fundada 2002, 24 años, 5 sedes MX-USA, USDOT 2045279, 12 trucks). Owner: Hector Leyva. Contact: Andrea Chávez +52 1 664 533 3512. Inbound via Sofi → Andrea (referido caliente). Meeting 1pm Tijuana en oficina de Andrea. PROGRESO 2026-05-18 PM session 4: Skills 01 (company-analyst) + 02 (industry-analyst, sector logística cross-border MX) + 03 (competitor-analyst) EJECUTADOS con revisión humana entre cada uno; outputs en pipeline/clients/trixx-logistics/. Hallazgo crítico: competidor real es Nuvocargo (USD 74M AI-native, target 150-350 envíos/mes = segmento Trixx), no los agentes locales TJ. Talking points calibrados a primer encuentro: Reforma Ley Aduanera 2026 + responsabilidad solidaria + multas Carta Porte como ángulo táctico principal. PENDIENTE: (1) our_hypotheses.md fill (t-our-hypotheses-fill, juicio Ricardo, 20-30 min); (2) Skill 04 PrepLlamada calibrada relacional NO auditoría técnica; (3) opcional practice con JP; (4) opcional WhatsApp a Andrea preguntando audiencia. Post-meeting: Skill 05 (opportunity-report) consume reportes + recording → revisión obligatoria Ricardo+JP (Fase 5) → entrega manual (Fase 6). UPDATE 2026-05-19 PM (session 5): pre-meeting critical path CERRADO. our_hypotheses.md llenado conjunto + Skill 04 PrepLlamada ejecutado con calibración relacional NO técnica (~6,500 palabras en 7 secciones + apertura relacional 4.0 nueva). 4 PDFs entregados al Desktop de Ricardo listos para la reunión: Company + Industry + Competitor + PrepLlamada (total 1.5 MB). 9 hipótesis a confirmar/refutar documentadas en our_hypotheses.md §6 + PrepLlamada sección 6. Reunión T-6 días. Materiales listos. UPDATE 2026-05-26 (session 19): la reunion 2026-05-25 originalmente planeada NO ocurrio en esa fecha. En su lugar, una conversacion informal Andrea-Ricardo ocurrio 2026-05-26 (TODAY) donde Andrea entrego inteligencia clave que cambio el panorama: (a) decisora real = madre de Andrea NO Hector; (b) USD 1M+ inversion china reciente para 10 trucks (~80% expansion de flota 12->22); (c) Excel->PDF CBP pain mostrado en pantalla (exacto al segundo, alto stakes); (d) husband-of-Andrea trabaja en empresa de logistica automatizada en San Diego (evento despertador); (e) intencion declarada = automatizar la cadena completa + tracking. Skills 01-04 re-corridas 2026-05-26 con la nueva inteligencia: Skill 01 full re-run (decisor corregido + budget signal upgraded MEDIO->MEDIO-ALTO + QW1 ahora Excel-PDF CBP automation Fase 1); Skills 02+03 refresh con update note (sector + competidores sin cambio); Skill 04 PrepLlamada totalmente nueva calibrada para 3-audience dynamic + 9-eslabon process map + no-solution-today directive. 4 PDFs nuevos en /home/ricardo/Desktop/ (Trixx_AnalisisCompania + LogisticaCrossBorder_MX + Trixx_Competencia_MX + Trixx_PrepLlamada todos _20260526.pdf). Toolchain validado operacional en ricardo-desktop. Reunion formal 3-personas PENDIENTE - sin fecha confirmada. when actualizada a 2026-06-10 como milestone target.

events.title: Wire brand-kit logos into all 5 generate_docx.py renderers — DONE 2026-05-18 ahead of deadline
events.notes: COMPLETED 2026-05-18 PM. Brand Guide read; Aurora palette + logos + header/footer wired into all 5 renderers; refactored into skills/shared/brand.py as single source of truth (BRAND_GUIDE_VERSION=1.0 pinned). Test harness 32 PASS held throughout. Sample PDFs at /tmp/brand_test/. Future brand tweaks are single-file edits. Also closes the previously-deferred docx-renderer dedup item. JP-coordination pre-step skipped per Ricardo's directive.

events.title: Design intake-upload workflow + document handoff convention — DONE 2026-05-18 ahead of deadline
events.notes: DONE 2026-05-18 PM (3rd session). Workflow: bash infra/scripts/new-client.sh <slug> <country> '<name>' <sector> [--pilot] scaffolds the client folder + drops the two ADR-027 intake templates from skills/shared/ into 00_intake/. Operator fills research_input.md (facts, slice 1+2) and our_hypotheses.md (judgment, slice 3 — SEALED during Skills 01-03). Trigger phrase: 'Analiza <slug>'. Documented in pipeline/clients/_template/README.md + skills/README.md. Manual stand-in until /intake Telegram plugin lands in Plan 07. Legacy single-file operations/templates/fase_0_intake_form.md deleted (superseded by ADR-027 2-file split).

events.title: Scaffold pipeline/clients/trixx-logistics/ + capture intake + state.json
events.notes: cp -r pipeline/clients/_template pipeline/clients/trixx-logistics; populate 00_intake/ with WhatsApp + site findings; populate state.json with country=MX + phase=prospect + pilot=true. Unblocks t-monday-meeting-prep.

events.title: Migrate 3 test companies from Pilotos/ to pipeline/clients/<slug>/
events.notes: Architecture correctness: git mv Pilotos/Bodai → pipeline/clients/bodai-foods/, Ascenso → constructora-ascenso, Scarab → scarab-cycles. Per-skill outputs to station folders. Process-level deck + improvements .txt stay separate. Non-blocking for Trixx Logistics pilot.

events.title: Nexostrat real-capabilities catalog (internal — what we can deliver TODAY)
events.notes: Redirected by JP's redesign — now an internal reference rather than skill-prompt input (JP owns prompts). Useful when discussing solutions with the client during Fase 6 follow-up. Deliverable shape unchanged: 1-pager with service + fixed price + timeline + stack + 'cannot deliver today' list.

events.title: Confidence marking ✓/~/? in company-analyst (verify if still needed)
events.notes: JP's new opportunity-report has built-in ✅/⚠️/❓ marking. Check whether JP's new company-analyst SKILL.md also has it; if yes, this task is redundant. If not, add it. ~10-15 min if needed.

events.notes: Plan 02a Tasks 4-10 (~1.5h subagent-driven OR ~3h inline). Database token retained for skill renderers + bot. Plan defect to patch during execution: ~/.config/age/key.txt references in tests + Task 14 — only nexostrat.key.age exists (passphrase-protected).

events.title: Plan 02a Chunk C — execute Tasks 11-20 (BookStack + backup/recovery + runbooks + v0.2a tag)
events.notes: Plan 02a Tasks 11-20. Blocked by Chunk B (schema must exist before reconcile + e2e test can run). ~1h subagent-driven. Closes Plan 02a with tag v0.2a-foss-stack. Plan 02b (Docs Diátaxis) is parallel-track — can land before or after.
